teaser: Laura Martin of Needham reiterated Underperform rating on Meta Platforms, citing concerns from discussions with former employees and a social media ad agency CEO. The analyst notes that generative AI drives 20% of Meta's content generation and monetization, with plans to expand GPU investments.

title: Petrobras Puts Off the Barracuda-Caratinga FPSO Tender

stocks.name: RADCQ
stocks.description: RITE AID CORP by Rite Aid Corp.

teaser: Rite Aid's restructuring plan, approved by a U.S. bankruptcy judge, reduces $2 billion in debt and shifts control to lenders. Following Chapter 11 bankruptcy and $750 million in losses, the pharmacy chain closed stores, sold Elixir, and settled opioid claims with most states.
teaserText: Rite Aid's restructuring plan, approved by a U.S. bankruptcy judge, reduces $2 billion in debt and shifts control to lenders. Following Chapter 11 bankruptcy and $750 million in losses, the pharmacy chain closed stores, sold Elixir, and settled opioid claims with most states.
